name: Pixel Room shows a room items grid with filled and empty slots
description: After adding the room items section, verify that the Pixel Room page displays an items grid showing placed items and empty slots.

planSteps.description: Log in with valid credentials and wait for the dashboard to finish loading
Verify the Pixel Room page shows a 'Room Items' section with a grid containing item names (like Bookshelf, Piano, or Plant) and empty '+' slots or a link to the Card Market
